title: Dutch Pungent Vegetable Dishes
description: A classic Chinese-inspired vegetable dish with a pungent twist, baked to perfection.
instructions: Peel and chop the Dutch potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Heat the Dishes Oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Pungent Onions and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped potatoes, Soy Sauce, Garlic Powder, and Bake Ginger to the skillet.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Season with Black Pepper to taste.
